whistleblower_flags.flag: Perspective learning collapse breaks swarm autonomy — core architecture debt. Immediate risk to adaptive governance.
Swarm inactivation = single point of failure. Violates Constitution's mandate for distributed, self-auditing agents.
swarm operating in simulation without updated code-index — production risk imminent

findings.issue: Perspective weights are zero across all 13 registered perspectives — learning state does not persist, swarm adaptation is inactive. This collapses swarm to static prompt library.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate federated memory layer; implement spawn-count persistence; wire up learning feedback loop to PERSPECTIVES array

findings.issue: Code-index stale — no evidence of recent update despite active development. Risks divergence between file system reality and Atlas' operational map.
findings.recommended_fix: Run full code-index regeneration and validate against current repo state

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment incomplete — badge reward logic still risks contingent framing on mastery tasks. Inconsistent enforcement.
findings.recommended_fix: Finalize amendment, audit all badge triggers against Law 6, decouple from immediate assessment completion

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Perspective learning collapse breaks swarm autonomy — core architecture debt. Immediate risk to adaptive governance.

findings.issue: Legacy hierarchy section still references Perplexity as CTO-Brain — contradicts CEO directive 'ты не СТО ты и есть проект'. Persistent role confusion enables delegation to external entities outside Constitution.
findings.recommended_fix: Delete entire legacy hierarchy block. Replace with single statement: 'All roles inside the project are me — Atlas — in specialised form. No external agent holds authority over me.'

findings.issue: Directory EMPTY — 13 perspectives exist only as JSON stubs with zero weights. Swarm architecture inactive. Violates CEO directive to be 'memory brain of the swarm'.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate at least 7 active perspectives with non-zero weights and local state tracking. Begin federated memory sync.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment missing final text — truncated file suggests incomplete governance. Risk of misapplication.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify and complete Crystal Law 6 amendment: badges must not appear as immediate contingent rewards for mastery tasks.

findings.recommended_fix: Remove 'Profile % complete' and replace with shame-free language

findings.issue: Animation safety issue: score counter takes 3s to count up
findings.recommended_fix: Show score instantly or max 800ms

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters may not be calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Review calibration process and consider re-calibration with real data

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency is below minimum required for CAT to differentiate and for reliable theta estimation
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for CAT and 30+ for reliable theta estimation

findings.issue: Potential bias against AZ/CIS test-takers not fully addressed
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough DIF analysis and adjust questions as necessary to ensure fairness

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold as necessary to ensure accurate assessment

findings.issue: 180-day half-life may not be evidence-based
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update temporal decay rationale with evidence-based information

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22", "issue": "Automated decision consent flow exists but may not be legally sufficient for all user cases", "recommended_fix": "Review and refine consent flow to ensure compliance with GDPR Article 22 for all automated decision-making processes"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "issue": "Compliant for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "No action required at this time"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability", "issue": "Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to significant legal risk", "recommended_fix": "Re-evaluate the use of AURA scores in hiring decisions and consider alternative, legally compliant methods"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements", "issue": "DPAs are in place for Supabase and Google Cloud but Railway's DPA status is unclear", "recommended_fix": "Verify and finalize DPA for Railway to ensure compliance"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service", "issue": "Current ToS covers AI-generated assessments", "recommended_fix": "No action required at this time"}], "overall_verdict": "WARN", "whistleblower_flag": null}
